matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-recensione-001 title: create a new review module: recensione source pages: 1, 2 preconditions: user is logged in as a client. test data: - titolo: "great product" - descrizione: "i really liked the product." - voto: 5 - cliente: "john doe" - venditore: "vendor x" test steps: 1. log in as a client. 2. navigate to the review creation page. 3. enter the provided data into the respective fields. 4. click on the "submit review" button. expected result: a new review should be created with the provided details.

test case id: tc-segnalazione-001 title: create a new report module: segnalazione source pages: 1, 2 preconditions: user is logged in as a client. test data: - titolo: "broken product" - descrizione: "the product is not working properly." - cliente: "john doe" - venditore: "vendor x" test steps: 1. log in as a client. 2. navigate to the report creation page. 3. enter the provided data into the respective fields. 4. click on the "submit report" button. expected result: a new report should be created with the provided details.

test case id: tc-recensione-002 title: update a review module: recensione source pages: 1, 2 preconditions: review already exists. test data: - new titolo: "improved product" - new descrizione: "the product has improved since last time." - new voto: 4 test steps: 1. log in as a client. 2. navigate to the review management page. 3. select the existing review to edit. 4. enter the new data into the respective fields. 5. click on the "update review" button. expected result: the selected review should be updated with the new information.

test case id: tc-prodotto-002 title: add a new product module: prodotto source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: user is logged in as a vendor. test data: - nome: "new product" - categoria: "clothing" - prezzo: 29.99 - descrizione: "a stylish clothing item." - scadenza: "2023-12-31" test steps: 1. log in as a vendor. 2. navigate to the product addition page. 3. enter the provided data into the respective fields. 4. click on the "add product" button. expected result: a new product should be added with the provided details.

test case id: tc-segnalazione-002 title: update a report module: segnalazione source pages: 1, 2 preconditions: report already exists. test data: - new titolo: "updated report" - new descrizione: "the product is still not working." test steps: 1. log in as a client. 2. navigate to the report management page. 3. select the existing report to edit. 4. enter the new data into the respective fields. 5. click on the "update report" button. expected result: the selected report should be updated with the new information.
